title: QUIC RFC 9000 Retry Replay ACK Piggyback Work Item
summary: Implement and prove fresh pending Initial ACK prefixing for Retry-selected Initial replay packets without changing Retry token echoing, Retry-selected destination connection ID, retained ClientHello bytes, or packet-number continuity.
planned_changes:
- Wire the Retry-selected Initial replay helper to build a transient Initial ACK frame payload when Initial ACK-generation state has pending ack-eliciting receipts.
- Pass that transient ACK payload to the existing Initial packet builder before the replayed CRYPTO frame while preserving the Retry token and Retry-selected destination connection ID.
- Mark the piggybacked Initial ACK frame as sent only after the replay packet is tracked under its actual new Initial packet number.
- Preserve existing behavior when no Initial ACK is pending.
- Keep ordinary non-Retry bootstrap probe replay, delayed-ACK scheduling, path scheduling, interop success, and public API behavior outside this slice.
- Add focused positive, negative, deterministic fuzz/property, and BenchmarkDotNet coverage for the Retry-selected Initial replay packet-builder path.
verification_plan: Run the focused RFC 9000 S13P2P1-0010 requirement-home tests, run adjacent RFC 9000 Retry replay requirement-home tests, run the CRT retry bootstrap requirement-home tests, run the long-header packet-protection benchmark suite with BenchmarkDotNet Dry and Short jobs, render/check the touched SpecTrace artifacts, validate JSON and preserve standing failures if present, run `git diff --check`, and preserve evidence under `artifacts/verification/20260425-rfc9000-retry-replay-ack-piggyback/` and `artifacts/benchmark-baseline/20260425-rfc9000-retry-replay-ack-piggyback/`.
out_of_scope: Ordinary non-Retry bootstrap probe replay ACK piggybacking.
Application Data stream, NEW_TOKEN, live long-header CRYPTO, and CRYPTO retransmission ACK piggybacking already owned by earlier slices.
completion_notes: Completed as a bounded Retry-selected Initial replay packet-composition floor. Broader ordinary bootstrap probe replay, delayed-ACK scheduling, path scheduling, interop, and public API behavior remain outside this work item.
